title: Thai Style Tom Yum Soup
description: A spicy and sour Thai soup made with a variety of ingredients including australian tomatoes. Serve hot and enjoy!
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add peppercorns and sauté for 1 minute.
Add crushed tomatoes and australian tomatoes, cook for 5 minutes.
Add 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add iceberg lettuce leaves and cook for 1 minute.
Serve hot and garnish with additional lettuce leaves if desired.
Serve with rice or noodles if desired.
